title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: AWS argues that junior cloud engineers should focus on understanding fundamentals like security, reliability, and cost rather than coding alone, since AI can generate infrastructure code. The best juniors use AI agents to move faster while validating outputs against engineering principles.
